seo.title: PrimaSTEM — Screen-Free Coding and Math for Ages 4–10
seo.description: The only screen-free education tool that teaches both coding and mathematics. Wooden programmable robot for children aged 4 to 10.

hero.title: Coding and math without a screen!
hero.subtitle:
Teaches coding, logic, arithmetic, and geometry — by hand.
Ages 4–10.

twoLevels.title: Two levels — one device
twoLevels.subtitle: One purchase — lasts through primary school.

items: Precise distances and angles of any value

drawing.title: The robot draws what the child programs
drawing.subtitle: The robot drew them following a child's program. Watch the process on YouTube.

maps.title: Works with maps you already have
maps.text:
PrimaSTEM adapts to the content of other educational robots.

Step size is adjustable — 10, 12, 15, 25 cm. Any grid map works. No new materials needed.

video.title: See it in action
video.subtitle: Watch how children learn coding and math with PrimaSTEM.
video.videoCaption: Video recorded with a prototype. Final product may differ.

trust.title: Trusted by our partners
trust.countriesLine: Early pilots and partners across Europe.

newsletter.title: Stay updated with news and offers
newsletter.subtitle: No more than once a month.

tagline.blockquote:
Our attempt to make something people truly need.
Tangible and beautiful.
